Utility)
testbasec
TestStatelessAclc
superr
myinitZ
_start_ovsZ
_start_netagent)
self
	__class__
B/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/na_tests/ft/test_stateless_acl.pyr
TestStatelessAcl.myinitc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
acl_by_add_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='acl_config' chain='root'>
  <uuid>54ba2e43-a4c2-44e1-be3c-134034983232</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <tcp dstipaddr='1.2.3.6' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{aclconfig}.xml
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={aclconfig}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={aclconfig}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {aclconfig}
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'tcp,reg1=0x.*/0xffff,nw_dst=1.2.3.6 actions=drop' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=2 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config nwfilter
na-ctl wait --id=2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'tcp,reg1=0x.*/0xffff,nw_dst=1.2.3.6 actions=drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 1; then
    exit 3
acl_config)
Z	aclconfig
nwfilterdir
test_dirTr
z,test acl config failed: shell return code:%d
cmd_execute
formatZ
nwfilter_dirZ	_test_dirZ
assertEqual
retr
test_acl_config
7z TestStatelessAcl.test_acl_configc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
acl_by_add_acl_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='acl_icmp' chain='root'>
  <uuid>5b5b5872-1234-4544-a542-66ecd2d2343e</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <icmp dstipaddr='1.2.3.6' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_acl_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{aclicmp}.xml
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={aclicmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={aclicmp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {aclicmp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -eq 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=10.0.0.4,dst=10.0.0.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
acl_icmp)
aclicmpr
z*test acl icmp failed: shell return code:%dr
test_acl_icmpM
TestStatelessAcl.test_acl_icmpc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
acl_by_add_tcp_in_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
 <filter name='acl_tcp_in' chain='root'>
   <uuid>54ba3333-a4c2-44e1-be3c-13403498e40e</uuid>
    <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
      <all/>
    </rule>
    <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
      <all/>
    </rule>
    <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
      <all-ipv6/>
    </rule>
    <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
      <all-ipv6/>
    </rule>
    <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='10' statematch='false'>
      <tcp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
    </rule>
 </filter>
acl_by_add_tcp_out_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='acl_tcp_out' chain='root'>
  <uuid>54ba2e43-a4c2-ffff-be3c-13403498e40e</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <tcp dstipaddr='1.2.3.6' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_tcp_in_default > {nwfilterdir}/{basetcpin}.xml
acl_by_add_tcp_out_default > {nwfilterdir}/{basetcpout}.xml
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={basetcpin}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={basetcpin}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {basetcpin}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -eq 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=2 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config nwfilter
na-ctl wait --id=2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl add-listen --id=3 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={basetcpout}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={basetcpout}
na-ctl wait --id=3
na-ctl nwfilter update {basetcpout}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows2.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows2.txt
if test $? -eq 0; then
    exit 4
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows3.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows3.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 5
acl_tcp_inZ
acl_tcp_out)
Z	basetcpinZ
basetcpoutr
z)test acl tcp failed: shell return code:%dr
test_acl_tcp
TestStatelessAcl.test_acl_tcpc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
acl_by_add_udp_in_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='acl_udp_in' chain='root'>
  <uuid>dd1830b2-a05d-4e94-3453-03991804864e</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <udp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_udp_out_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='acl_udp_out' chain='root'>
  <uuid>dd1830b2-3456-4e94-1232-03991804864e</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <udp dstipaddr='1.2.3.6' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_udp_in_default > {nwfilterdir}/{baseudpin}.xml
acl_by_add_udp_out_default > {nwfilterdir}/{baseudpout}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={baseudpin}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={baseudpin}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {baseudpin}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=17,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),udp(src=7777,dst=80)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -eq 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=17,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),udp(src=7777,dst=80)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
na-ctl add-listen --id=2 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config nwfilter
na-ctl wait --id=2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl add-listen --id=3 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={baseudpout}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={baseudpout}
na-ctl wait --id=3
na-ctl nwfilter update {baseudpout}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=17,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),udp(src=7777,dst=80)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows2.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows2.txt
if test $? -eq 0; then
    exit 4
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=17,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),udp(src=7777,dst=80)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows3.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows3.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 5
acl_udp_inZ
acl_udp_out)
Z	baseudpinZ
baseudpoutr

test_acl_udp
TestStatelessAcl.test_acl_udp)	
__name__
__module__
__qualname__r
__classcell__r
__main__)	Z
unittestZ
na_tests.common.utilityr
na_tests.commonr
TestCaseBaser
mainr
<module>
